root_cause_farsi_mobile: Previous app required audio-manifest.js ready=true before trying MP3 files. If the manifest was stale/overwritten/cached false, mobile never tried existing MP3s. v1.2 tries direct card audio_fa paths first and uses no-store for audio manifest/audio fetches.
upload_note: Keep existing generated audio/fa/ and audio-manifest.js in GitHub; do not overwrite them with placeholders.
